⚠️ Please read before submitting
  • A 20% downpayment is required to secure your order. The remaining 80% balance is due by May 26, 2026.
  • Pre-orders are not confirmed until the 20% downpayment has been received and verified.
  • Prices are in Philippine Peso (PHP) and are non-negotiable.
  • Pre-order slots are limited. First-come, first-served.
  • For apparel & footwear, select 2 sizes in order of preference. Size change only allowed if selected size is unavailable. All sales are final.
  • Items are official Weverse merchandise sourced directly from Korea. Slight delays may occur due to shipping and customs.
  • Korea-to-PH sea cargo is FREE. ETA June–July 2026. These are estimates and may change.
  • Local shipping fee to your address is not included and will be charged separately before delivery.
  • In the event that an item becomes sold out, the corresponding downpayment will be fully refunded.
  • By submitting this form, you agree to these terms and confirm that your order details are correct.
